```{r KPI Tracker by Month}
#       onchange = "Reactable.setGroupBy('access-metrics', this.value ? [this.value] : [])",
#       tags$option("None", value = ""),
#       lapply(c("Year", "Month"), tags$option)
#     ),
# 
#     tags$hr("aria-hidden" = "true"),
    
reactable(
  merged_data_month %>%
    filter(SITE %in% c("MSB", "MSBI", "MSDMG", "MSH- AMBULATORY CARE", "MSH-MSDFP", "MSM", "MSQ",
                       "MSUS", "MSW", "NETWORK", "NYEE", "MSB")) %>%
    filter(PROV_TYPE == "Physician"),
  elementId = "performance-tracker-month",
  # elementId = "referral-vol-download-table",
  style = list(fontFamily = 'Calibri',
                 fontSize = '14px'),
    defaultColDef = colDef(align = "left",
                           headerStyle = list(fontWeight = "Bold", fontSize = "14px"),
                           headerClass = "bar-sort-header"),
  # RowStyle = function(index) {
  #           if (index %in% c(nrow(referral_vol_site_data_mshs))) {
  #             list(`border-top` = "2px solid rgb(184,184,184)",
  #                  fontWeight = "Bold")
  #           }
  #         },
    highlight = TRUE,
    # filterable = TRUE,
    pagination = FALSE,
    # height = 800,
    wrap = TRUE,
  searchable = TRUE,

  groupBy = c("appt_year", "appt_month","SITE","STANDARD_ADDRESS","DEPT_SPECIALTY_NAME","DEPARTMENT_NAME","PROV_TYPE"),

  columnGroups = list(
    colGroup(name = "", columns = c("appt_year", "appt_month"),
             headerStyle = list(color = "black", fontSize = "15px"),
             sticky = "left"),
    colGroup(name = "", columns = c("SITE","STANDARD_ADDRESS","DEPT_SPECIALTY_NAME","DEPARTMENT_NAME","PROV_TYPE", "PROV_NAME_WID"),
             headerStyle = list(color = "black", fontSize = "15px")),
    colGroup(name = paste0("Arrived Visits"),
             columns = c("Arrived_AVG", "Arrived_FRIDAY", "Arrived_VAR", "Arrived_VAR_PERC"),
             headerStyle = list(background = "#7f7f7f", color = "white", fontSize = "15px")),
    colGroup(name = paste0("Practicing Physicians"),
             columns = c("md_cnt_AVG", "md_cnt_FRIDAY", "md_cnt_VAR", "md_cnt_VAR_PERC"),
             headerStyle = list(background = "#212070", color = "white", fontSize = "15px")),
    colGroup(name = paste0("Sessions"),
             columns = c("session_cnt_AVG", "session_cnt_FRIDAY", "session_cnt_VAR", "session_cnt_VAR_PERC"),
             headerStyle = list(background = "#d80b8c", color = "white", fontSize = "15px")),
    colGroup(name = paste0("Unfilled Slots"),
             columns = c("unfilled_cnt_AVG", "unfilled_cnt_FRIDAY", "unfilled_cnt_VAR", "unfilled_cnt_VAR_PERC"),
             headerStyle = list(background = "#00aeef", color = "white", fontSize = "15px")),
    colGroup(name = paste0("No Show Rate"),
             columns = c("No_Show_Rate_AVG", "No_Show_Rate_FRIDAY"),
             headerStyle = list(background = "#a5a7a5", color = "white", fontSize = "15px"))
    ),

  columns = list(

     appt_year = colDef(
      name = "Year",
      maxWidth = 100),
     
     appt_month = colDef(
      name = "Week",
      maxWidth = 200),
     
     SITE = colDef(
      name = "Site",
      minWidth = 200),
     
     STANDARD_ADDRESS = colDef(
      name = "Location",
      minWidth = 400),
     
     DEPT_SPECIALTY_NAME = colDef(
      name = "Specialty",
      minWidth = 200),
     
     DEPARTMENT_NAME = colDef(
      name = "Department",
      minWidth = 200),
     
     PROV_TYPE = colDef(
      name = "Provider Type",
      minWidth = 200),
     
     PROV_NAME_WID = colDef(
      name = "Provider",
      minWidth = 200),
     
     Arrived_AVG = colDef(
      name = "Mon-Thu Avg",
      maxWidth = 80,
      headerStyle = list(background = "#7f7f7f", color = "white", fontWeight = "Bold", fontSize = "14px"),
      aggregate = 'sum',
      format = colFormat(separators = TRUE, digits = 0)),
     
     Arrived_FRIDAY = colDef(
      name = "Fri",
      maxWidth = 80,
      headerStyle = list(background = "#7f7f7f", color = "white", fontWeight = "Bold", fontSize = "14px"),
      aggregate = 'sum',
      format = colFormat(separators = TRUE, digits = 0)),
     
     Arrived_VAR = colDef(
      name = "Var",
      maxWidth = 80,
      headerStyle = list(background = "#7f7f7f", color = "white", fontWeight = "Bold", fontSize = "14px"),
      aggregate = JS("function(values, rows) {
        let totalArrived_AVG = 0
        let totalArrived_FRIDAY = 0
        rows.forEach(function(row) {
          totalArrived_AVG += row['Arrived_AVG']
          totalArrived_FRIDAY += row['Arrived_FRIDAY']
        })
        return (totalArrived_FRIDAY - totalArrived_AVG) || '-'
      }"),
      style = JS("function(rowInfo) {
        var value = rowInfo.row['Arrived_VAR']
        if (value > 0) {
          var color = '#008000'
        } else {
          var color = ' #e00000'
        }
        return { color: color, fontFamily: 'calibri', fontWeight: 'bold'}
      }"),
      format = colFormat(separators = TRUE, digits = 0)),
     
     Arrived_VAR_PERC = colDef(
      name = "% Var",
      maxWidth = 80,
      headerStyle = list(background = "#7f7f7f", color = "white", fontWeight = "Bold", fontSize = "14px"),
      aggregate = JS("function(values, rows) {
        let totalArrived_AVG = 0
        let totalArrived_FRIDAY = 0
        rows.forEach(function(row) {
          totalArrived_AVG += row['Arrived_AVG']
          totalArrived_FRIDAY += row['Arrived_FRIDAY']
        })
        return (totalArrived_FRIDAY - totalArrived_AVG) / totalArrived_AVG || '-'
      }"),
      style = JS("function(rowInfo) {
        var value = rowInfo.row['Arrived_VAR_PERC']
        if (value > 0) {
          var color = '#008000'
        } else {
          var color = ' #e00000'
        }
        return { color: color, fontFamily: 'calibri', fontWeight: 'bold'}
      }"),
      format = colFormat(percent = TRUE, digits = 1)),
     
     
     
     md_cnt_AVG = colDef(
      name = "Mon-Thu Avg",
      maxWidth = 80,
      headerStyle = list(background = "#212070", color = "white", fontWeight = "Bold", fontSize = "14px"),
      aggregate = 'sum',
      format = colFormat(separators = TRUE, digits = 0)),
     
     md_cnt_FRIDAY = colDef(
      name = "Fri",
      maxWidth = 80,
      headerStyle = list(background = "#212070", color = "white", fontWeight = "Bold", fontSize = "14px"),
      aggregate = 'sum',
      format = colFormat(separators = TRUE, digits = 0)),
     
     md_cnt_VAR = colDef(
      name = "Var",
      maxWidth = 80,
      headerStyle = list(background = "#212070", color = "white", fontWeight = "Bold", fontSize = "14px"),
      aggregate = JS("function(values, rows) {
        let totalmd_cnt_AVG = 0
        let totalmd_cnt_FRIDAY = 0
        rows.forEach(function(row) {
          totalmd_cnt_AVG += row['md_cnt_AVG']
          totalmd_cnt_FRIDAY += row['md_cnt_FRIDAY']
        })
        return (totalmd_cnt_FRIDAY - totalmd_cnt_AVG) || '-'
      }"),
      style = JS("function(rowInfo) {
        var value = rowInfo.row['md_cnt_VAR']
        if (value > 0) {
          var color = '#008000'
        } else {
          var color = ' #e00000'
        }
        return { color: color, fontFamily: 'calibri', fontWeight: 'bold'}
      }"),
      format = colFormat(separators = TRUE, digits = 0)),
     
     md_cnt_VAR_PERC = colDef(
      name = "% Var",
      maxWidth = 80,
      headerStyle = list(background = "#212070", color = "white", fontWeight = "Bold", fontSize = "14px"),
      aggregate = JS("function(values, rows) {
        let totalmd_cnt_AVG = 0
        let totalmd_cnt_FRIDAY = 0
        rows.forEach(function(row) {
          totalmd_cnt_AVG += row['md_cnt_AVG']
          totalmd_cnt_FRIDAY += row['md_cnt_FRIDAY']
        })
        return (totalmd_cnt_FRIDAY - totalmd_cnt_AVG) / totalmd_cnt_AVG || '-'
      }"),
      style = JS("function(rowInfo) {
        var value = rowInfo.row['md_cnt_VAR_PERC']
        if (value > 0) {
          var color = '#008000'
        } else {
          var color = ' #e00000'
        }
        return { color: color, fontFamily: 'calibri', fontWeight: 'bold'}
      }"),
      format = colFormat(percent = TRUE, digits = 1)),
     
     
     
     session_cnt_AVG = colDef(
      name = "Mon-Thu Avg",
      maxWidth = 80,
      headerStyle = list(background = "#d80b8c", color = "white", fontWeight = "Bold", fontSize = "14px"),
      aggregate = 'sum',
      format = colFormat(separators = TRUE, digits = 0)),
     
     session_cnt_FRIDAY = colDef(
      name = "Fri",
      maxWidth = 80,
      headerStyle = list(background = "#d80b8c", color = "white", fontWeight = "Bold", fontSize = "14px"),
      aggregate = 'sum',
      format = colFormat(separators = TRUE, digits = 0)),
     
     session_cnt_VAR = colDef(
      name = "Var",
      maxWidth = 80,
      headerStyle = list(background = "#d80b8c", color = "white", fontWeight = "Bold", fontSize = "14px"),
      aggregate = JS("function(values, rows) {
        let totalsession_cnt_AVG = 0
        let totalsession_cnt_FRIDAY = 0
        rows.forEach(function(row) {
          totalsession_cnt_AVG += row['session_cnt_AVG']
          totalsession_cnt_FRIDAY += row['session_cnt_FRIDAY']
        })
        return (totalsession_cnt_FRIDAY - totalsession_cnt_AVG) || '-'
      }"),
      style = JS("function(rowInfo) {
        var value = rowInfo.row['session_cnt_VAR']
        if (value > 0) {
          var color = '#008000'
        } else {
          var color = ' #e00000'
        }
        return { color: color, fontFamily: 'calibri', fontWeight: 'bold'}
      }"),
      format = colFormat(separators = TRUE, digits = 0)),
     
     session_cnt_VAR_PERC = colDef(
      name = "% Var",
      maxWidth = 80,
      headerStyle = list(background = "#d80b8c", color = "white", fontWeight = "Bold", fontSize = "14px"),
      aggregate = JS("function(values, rows) {
        let totalsession_cnt_AVG = 0
        let totalsession_cnt_FRIDAY = 0
        rows.forEach(function(row) {
          totalsession_cnt_AVG += row['session_cnt_AVG']
          totalsession_cnt_FRIDAY += row['session_cnt_FRIDAY']
        })
        return (totalsession_cnt_FRIDAY - totalsession_cnt_AVG) / totalsession_cnt_AVG || '-'
      }"),
      style = JS("function(rowInfo) {
        var value = rowInfo.row['session_cnt_VAR_PERC']
        if (value > 0) {
          var color = '#008000'
        } else {
          var color = ' #e00000'
        }
        return { color: color, fontFamily: 'calibri', fontWeight: 'bold'}
      }"),
      format = colFormat(percent = TRUE, digits = 1)),
     
     
     unfilled_cnt_AVG = colDef(
      name = "Mon-Thu Avg",
      maxWidth = 80,
      headerStyle = list(background = "#00aeef", color = "white", fontWeight = "Bold", fontSize = "14px"),
      aggregate = 'sum',
      format = colFormat(separators = TRUE, digits = 0)),
     
     unfilled_cnt_FRIDAY = colDef(
      name = "Fri",
      maxWidth = 80,
      headerStyle = list(background = "#00aeef", color = "white", fontWeight = "Bold", fontSize = "14px"),
      aggregate = 'sum',
      format = colFormat(separators = TRUE, digits = 0)),
     
     unfilled_cnt_VAR = colDef(
      name = "Var",
      maxWidth = 80,
      headerStyle = list(background = "#00aeef", color = "white", fontWeight = "Bold", fontSize = "14px"),
      aggregate = JS("function(values, rows) {
        let totalunfilled_cnt_AVG = 0
        let totalunfilled_cnt_FRIDAY = 0
        rows.forEach(function(row) {
          totalunfilled_cnt_AVG += row['unfilled_cnt_AVG']
          totalunfilled_cnt_FRIDAY += row['unfilled_cnt_FRIDAY']
        })
        return (totalunfilled_cnt_FRIDAY - totalunfilled_cnt_AVG) || '-'
      }"),
      style = JS("function(rowInfo) {
        var value = rowInfo.row['unfilled_cnt_VAR']
        if (value > 0) {
          var color = '#e00000'
        } else {
          var color = '#008000'
        }
        return { color: color, fontFamily: 'calibri', fontWeight: 'bold'}
      }"),
      format = colFormat(separators = TRUE, digits = 0)),
     
     unfilled_cnt_VAR_PERC = colDef(
      name = "% Var",
      maxWidth = 80,
      headerStyle = list(background = "#00aeef", color = "white", fontWeight = "Bold", fontSize = "14px"),
      aggregate = JS("function(values, rows) {
        let totalunfilled_cnt_AVG = 0
        let totalunfilled_cnt_FRIDAY = 0
        rows.forEach(function(row) {
          totalunfilled_cnt_AVG += row['unfilled_cnt_AVG']
          totalunfilled_cnt_FRIDAY += row['unfilled_cnt_FRIDAY']
        })
        return (totalunfilled_cnt_FRIDAY - totalunfilled_cnt_AVG) / totalunfilled_cnt_AVG || '-'
      }"),
      style = JS("function(rowInfo) {
        var value = rowInfo.row['unfilled_cnt_VAR_PERC']
        if (value > 0) {
          var color = '#e00000'
        } else {
          var color = '#008000'
        }
        return { color: color, fontFamily: 'calibri', fontWeight: 'bold'}
      }"),
      format = colFormat(percent = TRUE, digits = 1)),
     
     
     
     No_Show_Rate_AVG = colDef(
      name = "Mon-Thu Avg",
      maxWidth = 80,
      headerStyle = list(background = "#a5a7a5", color = "white", fontWeight = "Bold", fontSize = "14px"),
      aggregate = JS("function(values, rows) {
        let totalNo_Show_AVG = 0
        let totalCanceled_AVG = 0
        let totalRescheduled_AVG = 0
        let totalArrived_AVG = 0
        rows.forEach(function(row) {
          totalNo_Show_AVG += row['No_Show_AVG']
          totalCanceled_AVG += row['Canceled_AVG']
          totalRescheduled_AVG += row['Rescheduled_AVG']
          totalArrived_AVG += row['Arrived_AVG']
        })
        return (totalNo_Show_AVG + totalCanceled_AVG + totalRescheduled_AVG) / (totalNo_Show_AVG + totalCanceled_AVG + totalRescheduled_AVG + totalArrived_AVG) || '-'
      }"),
      style = JS("function(rowInfo) {
        var value = rowInfo.row['No_Show_Rate_AVG']
        if (value > 0) {
          var color = '#e00000'
        } else {
          var color = '#008000'
        }
        return { color: color, fontFamily: 'calibri', fontWeight: 'bold'}
      }"),
      format = colFormat(percent = TRUE, digits = 1)),
     
     
     No_Show_Rate_FRIDAY = colDef(
      name = "Fri",
      maxWidth = 80,
      headerStyle = list(background = "#a5a7a5", color = "white", fontWeight = "Bold", fontSize = "14px"),
      aggregate = JS("function(values, rows) {
        let totalNo_Show_FRIDAY = 0
        let totalCanceled_FRIDAY = 0
        let totalRescheduled_FRIDAY = 0
        let totalArrived_FRIDAY = 0
        rows.forEach(function(row) {
          totalNo_Show_FRIDAY += row['No_Show_FRIDAY']
          totalCanceled_FRIDAY += row['Canceled_FRIDAY']
          totalRescheduled_FRIDAY += row['Rescheduled_FRIDAY']
          totalArrived_FRIDAY += row['Arrived_FRIDAY']
        })
        return (totalNo_Show_FRIDAY + totalCanceled_FRIDAY + totalRescheduled_FRIDAY) / 
        (totalNo_Show_FRIDAY + totalCanceled_FRIDAY + totalRescheduled_FRIDAY + totalArrived_FRIDAY) || '-'
      }"),
      style = JS("function(rowInfo) {
        var value = rowInfo.row['No_Show_Rate_FRIDAY']
        if (value > 0) {
          var color = '#e00000'
        } else {
          var color = ' #008000'
        }
        return { color: color, fontFamily: 'calibri', fontWeight: 'bold'}
      }"),
      format = colFormat(percent = TRUE, digits = 1)),
     
     holiday = colDef(show =F),
     DEPARTMENT_ID = colDef(show =F),
     PROV_ID = colDef(show =F),
     NPI = colDef(show =F),
     Arrived_MONDAY = colDef(show =F),
     Arrived_TUESDAY = colDef(show =F),
     Arrived_WEDNESDAY = colDef(show =F),
     Arrived_THURSDAY = colDef(show =F),
     Arrived_SATURDAY = colDef(show =F),
     Arrived_SUNDAY = colDef(show =F),
     md_cnt_MONDAY = colDef(show =F),
     md_cnt_TUESDAY = colDef(show =F),
     md_cnt_WEDNESDAY = colDef(show =F),
     md_cnt_THURSDAY = colDef(show =F),
     md_cnt_SATURDAY = colDef(show =F),
     md_cnt_SUNDAY = colDef(show =F),
     session_cnt_MONDAY = colDef(show =F),
     session_cnt_TUESDAY = colDef(show =F),
     session_cnt_WEDNESDAY = colDef(show =F),
     session_cnt_THURSDAY = colDef(show =F),
     session_cnt_SATURDAY = colDef(show =F),
     session_cnt_SUNDAY = colDef(show =F),
     unfilled_cnt_MONDAY = colDef(show =F),
     unfilled_cnt_TUESDAY = colDef(show =F),
     unfilled_cnt_WEDNESDAY = colDef(show =F),
     unfilled_cnt_THURSDAY = colDef(show =F),
     unfilled_cnt_SATURDAY = colDef(show =F),
     unfilled_cnt_SUNDAY = colDef(show =F),
     Canceled_MONDAY = colDef(show =F),
     Canceled_TUESDAY = colDef(show =F),
     Canceled_WEDNESDAY = colDef(show =F),
     Canceled_THURSDAY = colDef(show =F),
     Canceled_FRIDAY = colDef(show =F),
     Canceled_SATURDAY = colDef(show =F),
     Canceled_SUNDAY = colDef(show =F),
     Canceled_AVG = colDef(show =F),
     Rescheduled_MONDAY = colDef(show =F),
     Rescheduled_TUESDAY = colDef(show =F),
     Rescheduled_WEDNESDAY = colDef(show =F),
     Rescheduled_THURSDAY = colDef(show =F),
     Rescheduled_FRIDAY = colDef(show =F),
     Rescheduled_SATURDAY = colDef(show =F),
     Rescheduled_SUNDAY = colDef(show =F),
     Rescheduled_AVG = colDef(show =F),
     No_Show_MONDAY = colDef(show =F),
     No_Show_TUESDAY = colDef(show =F),
     No_Show_WEDNESDAY = colDef(show =F),
     No_Show_THURSDAY = colDef(show =F),
     No_Show_FRIDAY = colDef(show =F),
     No_Show_SATURDAY = colDef(show =F),
     No_Show_SUNDAY = colDef(show =F),
     No_Show_AVG = colDef(show =F)
     
  ) # Close Columns

  ) # Close Reactable
) # Close Taglist
) # Close htmltools


```
